title: genista aetnensis subsp. sarda
intro: Genista aetnensis subsp. sarda is a plant species of the pea family, known for its vibrant yellow flowers and ability to thrive in dry, rocky areas. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its alkaloids and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Genista aetnensis subsp. sarda include infusions, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
